title: Bridge Essay: Neuro-ontological interpretation of spiritual experiences.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Formless absorption — meditative absorption, samadhi, jhana, trance states, transcendental meditation, non-ordinary states of consciousness.

**Neuro-ontological interpretation of spiritual experiences.** — Neuropsychopharmacol Hung. PMID: 17211049. DOI:. The prevailing neuroscientific paradigm considers information processing within the central nervous system as occurring through hierarchically organized and interconnected neural networks. The hierarchy of neural networks doesn'tend at the neuroaxonal level; it incorporates subcellular mechanisms as well. When the size of the hierarchical components reaches the nanometer range and the number of elements exceeds that of the neuroaxonal system, an interface emerges for apossible transition betwe...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 8 (Formless/Absorption). Evaluation: Excellent (score=11.0)
